title: After Midnight
writer: Monta Bell, Joseph Farnham, Lorna Moon
actors: Norma Shearer, Lawrence Gray, Gwen Lee
plot: When Joe, a hold-up man, tries to rob Mary, a nightclub hostess, she winds winds up knocking him out. She takes pity on him, however, and nurses him back to health. He decides to go straight and marry her. Mary buys a $1000 Libert...
